tasks.title: Initialize monorepo foundation
tasks.notes: Created the initial EcoSync monorepo with React/Vite/Tailwind frontend skeleton, FastAPI backend skeleton, documentation, and this JSON planner as the single planning source of truth. Added environment example and repository ignore rules for local secrets, dependencies, and generated outputs.

subtasks.title: Create frontend workspace scaffold
Create backend workspace scaffold
Create root README and task tracker

tasks.title: Implement backend domain models and Alembic migration
tasks.notes: Implemented the backend domain schema with SQLAlchemy models, shared enums, Pydantic schemas, Alembic metadata wiring, and an initial migration for users, drivers, pickup_requests, complaints, rewards, and notifications. Added duplicate pickup prevention through a unique constraint on user, waste type, and scheduled date.

subtasks.title: Create SQLAlchemy declarative base and domain enums
Create ORM models for all required database tables
Create Pydantic schemas for API validation and serialization
Wire Alembic metadata and add initial schema migration

tasks.title: Build authentication and OTP service layer
tasks.notes: Implemented JWT token creation, password hashing/verification helpers, OTP request/verification service boundary, in-memory registration/login service, and versioned auth routes for registration, login, and OTP flows.

subtasks.title: Add JWT and password security helpers
Add OTP request and verification service
Add auth service and FastAPI router

tasks.title: Create frontend shell and public pages
tasks.notes: Created a modular frontend shell with reusable stat, empty, and skeleton components plus dedicated landing, login, and registration pages using modern responsive Tailwind glassmorphism styling.

subtasks.title: Extract reusable UI components
Create public landing page
Create login and registration pages

tasks.title: Implement dashboard routes for all roles
tasks.notes: Implemented role-based dashboard routes and reusable dashboard layout for citizen, driver, and municipal admin workflows with loading/empty states and responsive operational cards.

subtasks.title: Create dashboard layout and navigation
Create citizen dashboard
Create driver dashboard
Create admin dashboard

tasks.title: Add pickup, complaint, reward, map, and analytics APIs/UI
tasks.notes: Implemented pickup, complaint, reward, notification, and analytics API contracts with in-memory service logic; added frontend feature module page for pickup scheduling, complaints, rewards, maps/routes, recycling, and analytics capabilities.

subtasks.title: Add pickup scheduling and assignment APIs
Add complaint, reward, and notification APIs
Add analytics summary schema and endpoint
Add frontend feature module page

frontend.routing: React Router routes now include public pages, nested role dashboards, and feature modules.
frontend.state: Zustand reserved for session and UI state
frontend.data_fetching: React Query reserved for API server state
frontend.components: Reusable StatCard, EmptyState, SkeletonCard, and DashboardLayout components are available.
frontend.dashboards: Citizen, driver, and admin dashboard pages are implemented with responsive Tailwind layouts.
frontend.features: Feature module page summarizes pickup scheduling, complaint management, rewards, route visualization, recycling, and analytics functionality.

backend.env_example: backend/.env.example documents local defaults without committing secrets
backend.models: SQLAlchemy 2.0 typed models now cover users, drivers, pickup_requests, complaints, rewards, and notifications.
backend.schemas: Pydantic v2 schemas now provide create/update/read validation boundaries for TASK-002 domain entities.
backend.migrations: Alembic is wired to Base.metadata and includes 0001_initial_schema for the core PostgreSQL tables.
backend.duplicate_pickup_prevention: pickup_requests has uq_pickup_user_waste_date on user_id, waste_type, and scheduled_date.
backend.auth: JWT, password hashing, OTP request/verification, registration, and login endpoints are available under /api/v1/auth.
backend.operations: Pickup, complaint, reward, notification, and analytics API contracts are implemented under /api/v1 using an in-memory service layer pending database session integration.

implementation_details.next_dependency_safe_task: All initial TASK-001 through TASK-006 items are complete; next recommended work is persistence hardening, automated tests, and API integration.
